name: art
description: 2D game art asset production pipeline for Claude/Codex skill runtimes. Uses a local Forge/A1111-compatible backend, validates generated PNG assets, and writes manifests for Godot projects.

asset-pipeline.instructions: Use this server when a game workflow needs real 2D art assets. First create or read an art bible/style profile, then write asset_request.json, call generate_asset_pack, call validate_asset_pack, and only integrate assets that pass validation. For Godot projects, generated assets must be written under the active project, not under the plugin.
